title: psiadia salviifolia subsp. salviifolia
intro: Psiadia salviifolia subsp. salviifolia, also known as 'Sudan thistle', is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat digestive issues, as it contains compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Psiadia salviifolia subsp. salviifolia include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and potentially lowering blood pressure. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping its leaves in hot water, or as a decoction by boiling its roots in water.
